abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Catalyst
abilities.text: When an enemy model with a friendly Poison token activates within 3", deal 1 damage to it.

abilities.name: Demise (Animate Remains)
abilities.text: After this model is killed by an enemy model, it may drain a (soulstone) to summon an allied minion in base contact with itself.

actions.name: Ancient Injectors
actions.effects: If the target has a friendly Poison token, remove it and the target gains a Slow token and is moved up to 5". Otherwise, it gains a Poison token.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Control Graft
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target ally with a Graft token. The target declares an action printed on its crew card without removing its Graft token.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.
